startup_description: Boutique thoroughbred ownership and breeding experience focused on transparency, education, and personal connection to the horses.

hero_answers.Q1_problem_customer: People want to be part of horse ownership but do not trust large syndicates due to high markups, lack of transparency, and impersonal experiences.
Q2_target_user: New or emerging owners entering the sport
Passionate racing fans seeking deeper involvement
Professionals or small investors interested in breeding strategy and long-term value
hero_answers.Q3_success_metric: Within 30 days: professional brand, simple website, small engaged email list, 1–2 ownership or breeding opportunities, and first paying members.

Q6_constraints.compliance: Must follow racing and syndicate regulations
Q6_constraints.scale_limits: Do not dilute brand with too many horses

Q9_risks: Brand dilution from too many horses
hero_answers.Q10_shipping_preference: Start with a simple website, brand identity, and first ownership opportunities before adding technical complexity.
